attacking_style: Not an attacker. Specialized time trial power used exclusively in TTT scenarios where team discipline and aerodynamics maximize output over individual efforts.
team_tactics: Jumbo-Visma deploys him as pure TTT engine; team absorbs GC leadership responsibilities when he inherits jerseys, no expectation he defends beyond flat stages.
terrain_preference: Flat team time trials and prologues where track background converts directly. Mountains immediately expose limitations; cannot defend GC gains on any climbing terrain.
vulnerability: Any mountainous stages result in immediate time loss and jersey forfeiture. Acknowledged openly that climbing will cost him leadership within stages.
key_patterns: Inherits race leader jerseys through TTT dominance, never individual attacks (2 instances)
Track cycling background provides TTT power but zero climbing capability (2 references)
Jumbo-Visma system extracts immediate gains from TT specialists in debut seasons (2 data points)
Openly acknowledges mountains will end GC ambitions before they materialize (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent role as TTT specialist without evolution toward climbing or stage racing versatility across 2021-2022
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 3
